code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    STAR LEVEL CRITERIA:

    1 Star (Very Negative):
    - Strong dissatisfaction or anger
    - Product is defective, unsafe, completely ineffective, or returned
    - Clear statements such as "terrible," "junk," "don't buy," "returned," "doesn't work"
    - Safety hazards or total failure automatically lean toward 1
    - Multiple unresolved issues reported in same review

    2 Stars (Negative):
    - More negative than positive
    - Significant flaws, poor quality, missing parts, misleading description
    - Some limited usefulness but strong disappointment
    - Language such as "cheap," "useless," "not as pictured," "pain to use"
    - Functional but with major compromises affecting regular use

    3 Stars (Neutral / Mixed):
    - Balanced pros and cons with neither dominating
    - "It's okay," "average," "not great but not terrible"
    - Works but with limitations requiring compromises
    - Conflicted tone where satisfaction equals dissatisfaction
    - "Better than nothing" statements with explicit compromises

    4 Stars (Positive):
    - Mostly positive with SPECIFIC minor criticisms
    - Exceeds basic expectations but has clear imperfections
    - Satisfied but with reservations about durability/quality
    - Performance praise with explicit limitations (e.g., "great but heavy")
    - Requires special handling/maintenance for optimal use
    - Praise for aesthetics/design combined with functional limitations
    - Material quality concerns (thinness, stitching) despite good functionality
    - Explicit comparisons to superior products despite satisfaction
    - NEW: Practical disclaimers that require behavioral changes ("don't overstuff")

    5 Stars (Very Positive):
    - Unambiguous enthusiasm and strong recommendation
    - Core functionality excellence outweighs minor feature gaps
    - Transforms user experience through exceptional utility
    - Practical disclaimers with strong satisfaction (e.g., "needs care but works perfectly")
    - Explicit "highly recommend" statements despite minor criticisms
    - Sustained praise across multiple aspects (function, design, value)
    - NEW: Overcomes initial skepticism through exceptional results
    - NEW: Emotional language ("love," "perfect") outweighing neutral observations
    - NEW: Repeated validation through multi-use success stories

    EDGE CASE HANDLING:
    - Mixed updates: Final positive conclusion dominates initial skepticism
    - Core functionality excellence + non-critical flaws →5
    - Aesthetic praise + flawless function →5
    - Temporary satisfaction + long-term doubts →4
    - NEW: Material thickness mentions without functional impact →5 if core praise exists
    - NEW: Explicit recommendations override minor non-functional criticisms
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1:
Review: "Vacuum spat debris immediately. Fire hazard - returned instantly!"
Rating: 1

Example 2:
Review: "Lids cracked on first use. Works sometimes but leaks constantly."
Rating: 2

Example 3:
Review: "Functional but awkward sizing. Better than nothing temporarily."
Rating: 3

Example 4:
Review: "Vibrant color transformed my kitchen! Material thinner than premium brands but works perfectly."
Rating: 4

Example 5:
Review: "Overcame all doubts - performs flawlessly! Buying another for gifts despite minor size quirks."
Rating: 5

Example 6:
Review: "These bags hold snacks well if not overfilled. Docking 1 star for stitching inconsistencies."
Rating: 4

Example 7:
Review: "So far EXCELLENT! Makes perfect smoothies daily. Highly recommend despite stiff buttons."
Rating: 5

Example 8:
Review: "Effective but handles get hot. Saved my counters but only for quick use."
Rating: 3

Example 9:
Review: "Was skeptical due to reviews, but SOFTEST blanket ever! 5 stars despite thin material claims."
Rating: 5

Example 10:
Review: "Good value but not leakproof. Works for dry storage only."
Rating: 4

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
artifacts_json:

  1 star: OK
  2 star: OK
  3 star: OK
  4 star: OK
  5 star: OK
  All categories covered.

ERROR DISTRIBUTION (31 total misclassified):
  gold 5 -> 4: 16
  gold 4 -> 5: 10
  gold 4 -> 3: 3
  gold 1 -> 2: 1
  gold 3 -> 4: 1

MISCLASSIFIED EXAMPLES (your prompt got these wrong):
  1. Review: "This makes a nice easy way to buy a matched set of bags that includes reasonable versions of everything you need. They're not the best bags I've seen/had (there are a few spots where the stitching is a little off-kilter, and I don't love the material..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 3 | Workers: [4, 3, 3] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "Frankly I'm a bit at odds with these sheets but overall, ended up happy...with reservations. Growing up there was only one type of sheet...my mother, my grandmother and my great grandmother all swore by JC Penny percale sheets. Over the years I've tr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 3, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  4. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  5. Review: "I ended up liking this more than expected. It's not super soft but it looks good with modern yet "homespun" appearance to it. Easy to wash and goes anywhere - great to toss in the back of a sofa or chair, bring along in the car or just leave across t..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  6. Review: "I have only used this once so far, but I really like it. It is easy to operate once you figure out the steam buttons...lol! The scrubber was effective and it cleaned a pretty sticky kitchen floor. Next..on to my tile."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  7. Review: "So far this blender is working well for me. I've made a few strawberry banana smoothies for my kids and it's worked fine each time. One thing that wasn't skimped on was the looks. The build design of these blenders is very sharp looking, having a bri..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [4, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17

BORDERLINE EXAMPLES (correct but workers disagreed):
  1. Review: "I like the Stasher Snack bag. It is the perfect size for snacks on the go. I also like that you can store, cook, put in the microwave or even in the dishwasher! This is great for small treats. Don't try to overstuff. You don't want the seal to get fo..."
     Gold: 4 | Predicted: 4 | Workers: [5, 4, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17
  2. Review: "I ordered a package of these in black for my kids and their friends to use as Trick-or-Treat bags this year. Unlike other brands of these reusable grocery bags I've bought, these are a bit more narrow, like traditional paper grocery bags are. I like ..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 4, 5] | Disagreement: 0.17
  3. Review: "This mattress get 4 stars for comfort, but there's so many other nice features about it that it gets 5 starts for everything else. To begin with, I wouldn't suggest using this as a long term every day bed for someone. The shallow design and budget pr..."
     Gold: 5 | Predicted: 5 | Workers: [5, 5, 4] | Disagreement: 0.17

Summary: 31 errors, 16 borderline out of 80 examples."}
